title: [MTR4] Perth Pack
description: Perth vehicles by JoTrain for MTR4
body:
# MTR4 only. MTR3 is unsupported.
This resourcepack adds multiple Transperth vehicles. Original models were made by [JoTrain](https://jotrain.com.au).
List of vehicles:
- Transperth A series
- Transperth B series
- Transperth Volvo B7RLE Volgren Optimus bodied (RHD)
---
This pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of Transperth or Volvo.
